shipping: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days and is free on orders over $35. Expedited shipping (2-3 business days) is available for $9.99. Express shipping (next business day) is available for $19.99. Orders placed before 2pm ET ship the same day.
returns: Items can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Books must be in original, unread condition. To initiate a return, provide your order ID and reason. A prepaid return shipping label will be emailed within 24 hours. Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days of receiving the returned item.
password_reset: To reset your password, visit bookly.com/reset and enter your email address. You will receive a reset link within 5 minutes. If you do not see the email, check your spam folder. For further help, contact support at help@bookly.com.
payment: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and PayPal. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. We do not store full credit card numbers. Gift cards can be applied at checkout.
